author: aKidWolfe
name: ChatterboxTTS
description: Sends text to a local Chatterbox TTS server and plays it in your voice channel. Pauses and resumes Red's Audio cog automatically.
install_msg: Use `[p]tts <message>` while in a voice channel. Make sure your Chatterbox server is running at 192.168.1.227:8000.
